info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Container Registry API
info.description:
Azure Container Registry (ACR) is a managed Docker registry service based on the open-source Docker Registry 2.0. The REST API provides operations for managing repositories, tags, manifests, and registry operations, enabling automated container image builds, vulnerability scanning, and geo-replication for enterprise container deployments. ACR supports OCI artifacts and Helm charts in addition to Docker container images.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure Support
 Email: azuresupport@microsoft.com
